---
title: "Syllabus"
---


**Course Title:** Measuring the Mind: Advanced Psychological Measurement Theory  
**Instructor:** Prof. Pedro Cardoso-Leite  

## Course Schedule

coming soon

## Grading

- Class Participation, Exercises: 25%
- Final Exam: 75%

## Required Materials

- R (latest version)
- RStudio (latest version)
- R packages: tidyverse, lavaan, psych
